summary_es: Este modulo construye un ensamble lineal probabilistico (PLE) completo, comparandolo con OLS/MLE. Se especifican priors (Normal para alpha/beta, HalfStudentT para sigma), likelihood Student-t con nu=6, y se computa el posterior. Se comparan intervalos de confianza frecuentistas con intervalos credibles (HDI), mostrando que solo el HDI responde P(beta > 1) directamente. Se visualiza el ensamble generativo como spaghetti plot de cientos de lineas de regresion donde la divergencia en extrapolaciones revela incertidumbre del modelo. Se implementan retrodiction (posterior predictive check) y prediction con propagacion completa de incertidumbre. Se introduce R-squared probabilistico como distribucion en vez de punto unico.
summary_en: This module builds a complete probabilistic linear ensemble (PLE), comparing it with OLS/MLE. Priors are specified (Normal for alpha/beta, HalfStudentT for sigma), Student-t likelihood with nu=6, and the posterior is computed. Frequentist confidence intervals are compared with credible intervals (HDI), showing only HDI directly answers P(beta > 1). The generative ensemble is visualized as a spaghetti plot of hundreds of regression lines where extrapolation divergence reveals model uncertainty. Retrodiction (posterior predictive check) and prediction with full uncertainty propagation are implemented. Probabilistic R-squared is introduced as a distribution rather than single point.
learning_objectives_es: Construir un ensamble lineal probabilistico con priors y likelihood Student-t
Comparar intervalos de confianza frecuentistas con HDI bayesianos
Visualizar el ensamble generativo y su divergencia en extrapolaciones
Implementar retrodiction y prediction con propagacion de incertidumbre
learning_objectives_en: Build a probabilistic linear ensemble with priors and Student-t likelihood
Compare frequentist confidence intervals with Bayesian HDI
Visualize the generative ensemble and its extrapolation divergence
Implement retrodiction and prediction with uncertainty propagation
Calculate probabilistic R-squared as a distribution

parameters.name: Generative Ensembles
parameters.origin_phrase: Hundreds of plausible regression lines reveal model uncertainty

parameters.name: Priors as Regularization
parameters.origin_phrase: Priors for alpha, beta, sigma encode domain knowledge and prevent overfitting

parameters.name: Full Uncertainty Propagation
parameters.origin_phrase: Posterior predictive propagates both parameter and noise uncertainty

parameters.name: Model Transparency
parameters.origin_phrase: Every assumption (prior, likelihood, posterior) is explicit and inspectable
